A3.name: A3
A3.detail: Error: Can only compare identically-labeled Series objects

notes: A1: OLS residual identifies 40% different breakout labels than raw views. This is meaningful — the age-normalized metric captures a distinct signal.
A2: Category adds 0.0358 to R^2 in pooled model. Knowing a channel's category helps predict view counts.
A3: Not tested (no time series data). Channel momentum effect unknown.
actions: Use OLS residual as the primary breakout metric.
Include category as a covariate in the breakout model.
Ensure time series is loaded for future A3 tests.
